name: Lagercrantz Group
confidenceReason: Identical niche-B2B M&A model to Addtech/Lifco. Grows EPS beautifully at 15–20%+.
bullCase: Lagercrantz follows the same capital-light serial acquisition model as Lifco and Indutrade — acquiring niche industrial product companies with high switching costs and 15%+ EBIT margins. As one of Sweden's most disciplined compounders, it has delivered 20%+ annual returns over the past decade with minimal leverage.
bearCase: Multiple expansion from 38x current P/E to any reasonable terminal value implies substantial compression risk. A European industrial recession would simultaneously reduce organic growth and acquisition targets' earnings, compressing the portfolio value.
